principle: Task COUNT alone doesn't buy graph diversity -- a target distribution over normal-execution branch patterns keeps the 50 instances from collapsing onto one dominant event sequence (Step 6.5-9). A single task_instance may satisfy more than one pattern (e.g. both budget_revision and schedule_clarification), so targets may sum to more than 50.
failure_conditions_checked_post_generati: 70%+ of task instances produce an identical event_pattern (StructuralEvaluator.event_pattern)
any one branch pattern occurs in exactly 1 task instance
hard-difficulty instances have identical event_count to easy-difficulty instances across the board
every task instance activates the exact same agent set and edge pattern
explicit_prohibition: Do not pad edge/message counts with fabricated Message records to hit a target -- targets are satisfied only through genuine task_instance/content_bundle design (Step 6.5-9).
